full_text:
Cui Liang (Shiwen) 崔諒 (士文)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cui Liang (崔諒), styledShiwen (士文). Relative to Cui Yan, he was known for being humble. Cui Liang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.
